query_title: When a Woman Ascends the Stairs

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Snail
recommendations.overview: Forcibly separated from her twin brother when they are orphaned, a melancholic misfit learns how to find confidence within herself amid the clutter of misfortunes and everyday life.

recommendations.title: It's Now or Never
recommendations.overview: Narrates the preparation for a wedding of a Spanish couple in which everything goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Rosalie Blum
recommendations.overview: Vincent Machot knows his life by heart. He shares it between his hair dressing salon, his cousin, his cat, and his too-invasive mother. But life sometimes holds surprises, even for the most prudent of people... He crosses paths with Rosalie Blum by a

recommendations.title: The House That Jack Built
recommendations.overview: Failed architect, engineer and vicious murderer Jack narrates the details of some of his most elaborately orchestrated crimes, each of them a towering piece of art that defines his life's work as a serial killer for twelve years.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: The fates of horses, and the people who own and command them, are revealed as Black Beauty narrates the circle of his life.

recommendations.title: The Reflecting Skin
recommendations.overview: In 1950s rural Idaho, a young boy watches helplessly as his friends and brother fall under the spell of a mysterious widow living up the road and becomes convinced that she is a vampire.

recommendations.title: The Age of Adaline
recommendations.overview: After 29-year-old Adaline recovers from a nearly lethal accident, she inexplicably stops growing older. As the years stretch on and on, Adaline keeps her secret to herself  until she meets a man who changes her life.

recommendations.title: Darkman III: Die Darkman Die
recommendations.overview: Darkman, needing money to continue his experiments on synthetic skin, steals a crate of cash from drug lord Peter Rooker...

recommendations.title: Paris, Texas
recommendations.overview: A man wanders out of the desert not knowing who he is. His brother finds him, and helps to pull his memory back of the life he led before he walked out on his family and disappeared four years earlier.

recommendations.title: Embattled
recommendations.overview: The eldest son of a ruthlessly tough MMA champion must fight his way out of the abusive cycle his father has continued.
